servinfo.title: Gear Shift Control Lever and Cable Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Gear Shift Control Lever and Cable Components

s1.ptxt: Remove battery and battery tray with ECM.
Disconnect gear shift and select control cable ends (5) from pivot (6) of gear shift control lever assembly.
Disconnect gear shift and select control cables (1) from gear shift control lever assembly (2) while pulling quick joint (4) in arrow direction as shown in figure.
Remove nuts (3) and remove gear shift control lever assembly from floor panel.
Disconnect gear shift and select control cables from transaxle.
Remove cable grommet bolt, and then remove gear shift and select control cables from floor panel.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten each bolt and nut to specified torque.
